question.question_text: What will the USD/CAD exchange rate be on 2026-03-27 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast of a major currency pair like USD/CAD, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk assumption), as exchange rates are largely unpredictable over short horizons. Daily USD/CAD volatility is approximately 0.3-0.5% (roughly 40-70 pips). The confidence intervals are constructed using typical daily volatility: 50% CI uses ~±0.5 standard deviations (~13 pips), 80% CI uses ~±1.28 standard deviations (~25 pips), and 90% CI uses ~±1.645 standard deviations (~35 pips), where one standard deviation is approximately 25 pips based on recent USD/CAD historical volatility.
